name: Fresh
description: Newly turned and still fast — barely cooled, it moves before the stiffness takes it, closing the distance while you are still deciding.
signature: barely turned — clothes still whole, movements quick and wet, closing before you are ready
notes: FR-CBT-07 (T46). The swift tag drives the state machine (SWIFT_BONUS): with the player near, its stimulus surges so it reaches chasing where a plain node would only investigate. Combat teeth (initiative — answers every melee exchange) live in enemy.fresh. Human-only canon: someone who turned within the hour.
